positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos.tptp
1. working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [input(axiom)]
2. script_editor(badults,andrew_collins) [input(axiom)]
6. ? [X0] : (script_editor(X0,andrew_collins) & working_title(X0,secret_dude_society)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~? [X0] : (script_editor(X0,andrew_collins) & working_title(X0,secret_dude_society)) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ! [X0] : (~script_editor(X0,andrew_collins) | ~working_title(X0,secret_dude_society)) [ennf transformation 7]
9. working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [cnf transformation 1]
10. script_editor(badults,andrew_collins) [cnf transformation 2]
14. ~script_editor(X0,andrew_collins) | ~working_title(X0,secret_dude_society) [cnf transformation 8]
15. ~working_title(badults,secret_dude_society) [resolution 10,14]
16. $false [forward subsumption resolution 15,9]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    badults != andrew_collins).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    secret_dude_society != andrew_collins).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    badults != secret_dude_society).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define working_title(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define script_editor(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
